name: 产品模板
description: 商业产品摄影提示词模板

templates.name: 电商主图
templates.prompt: professional e-commerce product photography, {product}, white background, clean minimal style, studio lighting, high contrast, product centered, commercial quality, Amazon product style
templates.negative: cluttered background, amateur, unprofessional lighting, watermark

templates.name: 生活方式
templates.prompt: lifestyle product photography, {product}, {scene}, natural soft lighting, warm tones, magazine editorial style, aspirational mood, lifestyle brand aesthetic
templates.negative: clinical, harsh lighting, stock photo look

templates.name: 奢侈品
templates.prompt: luxury brand photography, {product}, dramatic lighting, dark moody background, premium feel, high-end fashion magazine style, editorial quality, sophisticated

templates.name: 美食摄影
templates.prompt: food photography, {dish}, top-down angle, styled props, natural lighting, {mood}, food blog style, appetizing colors, 85mm lens bokeh

templates.name: 包装设计
templates.prompt: product packaging design mockup, {product} packaging, {background}, professional presentation, mockup scene, clean design, modern packaging, vector style

templates.name: 科技产品
templates.prompt: tech product photography, {device}, sleek minimal design, studio lighting, dramatic shadows, futuristic feel, Apple style, clean white background option

templates.name: 服装模特
templates.prompt: fashion photography, clothing on {model_type}, {pose}, studio or {location}, editorial fashion, {style} style, magazine quality, stylish
templates.negative: amateur snapshot, poor lighting, outdated fashion

templates.name: 首饰珠宝
templates.prompt: jewelry photography, {jewelry}, macro lens detail, sparkle highlights, velvet display, luxury feel, clean black/white background, high end catalog style
